tips.title: The STAR Method
tips.description: Structure your answers using Situation, Task, Action, and Result formats to provide clear and concise behavioral evidence.

tips.title: Think Out Loud
tips.description: During coding or problem-solving tasks, vocalize your thought process. Interviewers care more about your logic than a perfect solution.

tips.title: Maintain Eye Contact
tips.description: Look directly at the camera while speaking to simulate eye contact. Avoid focusing only on your own video feed.

tips.title: Ask Insightful Questions
tips.description: Have 3-5 questions ready for the interviewer about team culture, technical debt, or growth opportunities.
